findings.title: ACCESS CONTROL leads (privileged fn, no modifier)
findings.note: external/public + privileged name, NO only* / inline auth

findings.title: abi.encodePacked HASH-COLLISION (dynamic args)
findings.note: 2+ ADJACENT DYNAMIC args (array/bytes/string PARAMS) in a hashed/signed abi.encodePacked -> the boundary is ambiguous: a player re-partitions the input to the SAME hash -> signature/commitment collision (Gigaverse ImportExport itemIds||itemAmounts -> item over-mint). Use abi.encode (length-prefixed) or EIP-712 typed data.
